title: BATTILO HOME Chocolate Brown Faux Fur Throw Blanket, Double Side Reversible Ruched Rabbit Fur Blanket for Couch, Bed, Cozy Soft Warm Mink Blanket, 150x200cm
features: SUPER SOFT & COZY: Get cozy and warm with this extremely soft and luxurious reversible rabbit fur blanket, perfect for snuggling up on the couch, bed, chilly movie theater, park or perfect personal gift for any occasion

CLASSY DECOR: Add extra texture to your decor and turn your room into an inviting space with this simple yet classy elegant double sided ruched design; drape it over a chair, couch or bed to add an exotic stylish touch to your living room or bedroom. Our available colors allow for easy mixing and matching with your decor or other accent pieces
BLANKET SIZE: 60x80 inches total, suitable for couch, sofa and toddler bed; fabric content: 97% microfiber polyester & 3% spandex throw blanket, elastic and no shedding
DIVERSE USAGE: Couch throw, Bed Blanket, Outdoor Indoor Blanket, Travel , Gift Item, House décor, Holiday Birthday Housewarming Anniversary Gift Throw, Photo Prop and more
MACHINE WASH: Machine wash on gentle cycle with cold water, tumble dry at very low temperature, holds several machine washes and dries beautifully
description: Product Description Designed with ruched stripe, our blanket adds a touch of simplicity and elegance to your home decor. This functional and decorative blanket is perfect for all relaxation needs and great for highlighting the style and taste of your home. Double-Sided Design It’s made of 2 layers thick and soft faux fur fabric. The reversible design makes you feel warm and fuzzy enough for outdoor or indoor use. Super Soft Faux Fur Material Made from 100% microfiber polyester throw blanket, the faux fur blanket possess skin-friendly and animal-friendly properties to replace real fur yet mimic animal-like touch. Versatile Throw Blanket This throw blankets measuerd in 50"x60", suitable for any scene, you can put it on the sofa, couch, chair, bed or somewhere else. It makes it a perfect throw for naps, reading, movie nights,or taking the chill out of the night air.
